properties.name: base.domain
properties.description: Base domain for the service. Can be overridden via BASE_DOMAIN environment variable.

properties.name: auth.base-path
properties.description: Base path for auth endpoints (must remain /auth to match gateway).

properties.name: endpoint.health
properties.description: Health endpoint path.

properties.name: endpoint.authorize-and-issue
properties.description: Combined marketplace authorization and provider credential endpoint path.

properties.name: auth.access-code.cleanup-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds for purging expired access codes.

properties.name: auth.access-code.encryption-key
properties.description: Base64URL-encoded 32-byte AES key used to encrypt access JWTs and recoverable codes at rest.

properties.name: health.queue-stuck-threshold-seconds
properties.description: Age threshold used by readiness for nonce backlogs and interrupted access deliveries.

properties.name: auth.access-code.redeemer-credentials-json
properties.description: JSON map of gateway IDs to the distinct secrets allowed to redeem browser access codes.

properties.name: endpoint.checkin-institutional
properties.description: Institutional check-in endpoint path.

properties.name: endpoint.jwks
properties.description: JWKS endpoint path.

properties.name: endpoint.wallet
properties.description: Wallet endpoint path.

properties.name: endpoint.treasury
properties.description: Treasury endpoint path.

properties.name: endpoint.intents
properties.description: Intents endpoint path.

properties.name: auth.access-authorization.wait-timeout-ms
properties.description: Maximum time the provider waits for on-chain ACCESS_AUTHORIZED before removing prepared Guacamole access.

properties.name: auth.access-authorization.poll-interval-ms
properties.description: Delay between provider checks of the on-chain reservation status.

properties.name: institutional.checkin.delegation.enabled
properties.description: Delegate institutional check-in to the payer institution backend when the local wallet is not an authorized check-in signer.

properties.name: institutional.checkin.delegation.endpoint-path
properties.description: Endpoint path used when delegating check-in to a remote institutional backend.

properties.name: institutional.checkin.outbox.interval-ms
properties.description: Interval for the worker that submits due institutional check-ins.

properties.name: institutional.checkin.outbox.receipt-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval for the worker that monitors submitted institutional check-in receipts.

properties.name: institutional.checkin.outbox.stuck-transaction-ms
properties.description: Age after which a pending institutional check-in is retried with its reserved nonce.

properties.name: institutional.checkin.outbox.nonce-replacement-gas-bump-percent
properties.description: Percentage gas-price bump for each retry of a pending transaction using the same nonce.

properties.name: checkin.receipt.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of eth_getTransactionReceipt polling attempts before institutional check-in is treated as unconfirmed.

properties.name: checkin.receipt.poll-interval-ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds between institutional check-in transaction receipt polling attempts.

properties.name: intents.api-key
properties.description: API key for intents service.

properties.name: intents.auth.enabled
properties.description: Enable JWT auth for intents endpoints.

properties.name: intents.auth.issuer
properties.description: JWT issuer expected for intents endpoints.

properties.name: intents.auth.audience
properties.description: JWT audience expected for intents endpoints.

properties.name: intents.auth.submit-scope
properties.description: Scope required to submit intents.

properties.name: intents.auth.status-scope
properties.description: Scope required to read intent status.

properties.name: intents.auth.clock-skew-seconds
properties.description: Clock skew tolerance for intents JWT validation.

properties.name: intent.trusted-signer
properties.description: Trusted signer address for intent validation.

properties.name: intent.default-eta
properties.description: Default ETA for intent execution.

properties.name: intent.domain.name
properties.description: EIP-712 domain name.

properties.name: intent.domain.version
properties.description: EIP-712 domain version.

properties.name: intent.domain.chain-id
properties.description: EIP-712 domain chain ID.

properties.name: intent.domain.verifying-contract
properties.description: EIP-712 verifying contract address.

properties.name: intent.reconciliation-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval for intent reconciliation in milliseconds.

properties.name: intent.saml.replay-ttl-ms
properties.description: SAML intent replay window in milliseconds.

properties.name: intent.webhook.url
properties.description: Webhook URL for intent notifications.

properties.name: intent.webhook.secret
properties.description: Secret for webhook HMAC signatures.

properties.name: intent.execution-interval-ms
properties.description: Interval for intent execution in milliseconds.

properties.name: webauthn.credentials.table
properties.description: Database table name for WebAuthn credentials.

properties.name: webauthn.credentials.max-age-days
properties.description: Maximum age (in days) before a WebAuthn credential is revoked.

properties.name: webauthn.credentials.revoke.interval.ms
properties.description: Interval (in milliseconds) to scan for expired WebAuthn credentials.

properties.name: webauthn.rp.id
properties.description: WebAuthn Relying Party ID. Must match the domain users see in browser.

properties.name: webauthn.rp.name
properties.description: WebAuthn Relying Party display name.

properties.name: webauthn.rp.origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for WebAuthn attestation.

properties.name: webauthn.timeout.ms
properties.description: WebAuthn ceremony timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: webauthn.session.ttl.seconds
properties.description: WebAuthn onboarding session TTL in seconds.

properties.name: webauthn.session.cleanup.interval.seconds
properties.description: Interval for purging expired WebAuthn sessions in seconds.

properties.name: webauthn.attestation.conveyance
properties.description: Attestation conveyance preference: none, indirect, or direct.

properties.name: webauthn.authenticator.attachment
properties.description: Authenticator attachment preference: platform, cross-platform, or empty.

properties.name: webauthn.resident-key
properties.description: Resident key preference: required, preferred, or discouraged.

properties.name: webauthn.user-verification
properties.description: User verification preference: required, preferred, or discouraged.

properties.name: features.providers.enabled
properties.description: Enable provider features.

properties.name: features.organizations.enabled
properties.description: Enable organization onboarding features.

properties.name: organization.invite.hmac-secret
properties.description: HMAC secret for organization invite links.

properties.name: organization.invite.default-issuer
properties.description: Default issuer for organization invites.

properties.name: marketplace.url
properties.description: URL of the DecentraLabs marketplace.

properties.name: marketplace.public-key-url
properties.description: URL where the marketplace exposes its public key for JWT validation.

properties.name: marketplace.key.cache-ms
properties.description: Cache duration for marketplace public key in milliseconds.

properties.name: contract.address
properties.description: Diamond contract address on the blockchain.

properties.name: institutional.wallet.address
properties.description: Institutional wallet address for automated transactions.

properties.name: institutional.wallet.password
properties.description: Password for decrypting institutional wallet key.

properties.name: saml.idp.trust-mode
properties.description: Trust mode for IdPs: whitelist or any.

properties.name: saml.trusted.idp
properties.description: Trusted IdP issuers JSON map (only used if trust-mode=whitelist).

properties.name: saml.metadata.allow-http
properties.description: Allow HTTP SAML metadata URLs (not recommended).

properties.name: saml.metadata.http.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Timeout in milliseconds for opening HTTP connections when downloading IdP metadata.

properties.name: saml.metadata.http.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: Read timeout in milliseconds for IdP metadata HTTP responses.

properties.name: saml.metadata.http.call-timeout-ms
properties.description: Total call timeout in milliseconds for IdP metadata download.

properties.name: saml.metadata.http.prefer-ipv4
properties.description: Prefer IPv4 resolution for IdP metadata HTTP requests.

properties.name: saml.metadata.http.curl-fallback.enabled
properties.description: Enable curl-based fallback for IdP metadata retrieval when JVM TLS handshake fails.

properties.name: saml.metadata.http.curl-path
properties.description: Path to curl binary used by SAML metadata fallback retrieval.

properties.name: private.key.path
properties.description: Path to private key PEM file for JWT signing.

properties.name: public.key.path
properties.description: Path to public key PEM file for JWT verification.

properties.name: admin.dashboard.local-only
properties.description: Restrict admin dashboard to local connections only.

properties.name: admin.dashboard.allow-private
properties.description: Allow admin dashboard access from private networks.

properties.name: admin.dashboard.allowed-cidrs
properties.description: Optional comma-separated CIDR allowlist for private-network dashboard access. Leave empty to allow any private range.

properties.name: security.allow-private-networks
properties.description: Allow connections from private networks.

properties.name: security.access-token
properties.description: Shared secret token required for internal endpoints.

properties.name: security.access-token-header
properties.description: Header name for the access token.

properties.name: security.access-token-cookie
properties.description: Cookie name for the access token.

properties.name: security.access-token.required
properties.description: Require access token for private network access.

properties.name: gateway.lab-manager.token
properties.description: Shared Lab Manager token accepted for backend lab-admin routes after OpenResty validation.

properties.name: gateway.lab-manager.token-header
properties.description: Header name for the Lab Manager token on backend lab-admin routes.

properties.name: gateway.lab-manager.allowed-cidrs
properties.description: Optional comma-separated CIDR allowlist for requests authenticated with the Lab Manager token on /lab-admin routes.

properties.name: lab.access.jwt.max-ttl-seconds
properties.description: Maximum lifetime in seconds for lab access JWTs issued by blockchain-services after reservation access validation.

properties.name: lab.content.base-path
properties.description: Base directory where Lab Manager stores generated lab metadata, images, and documentation.

properties.name: fmu.data.path
properties.description: Base directory where provisioned FMU files are stored and discovered.

properties.name: provisioning.token.http.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: HTTP connection timeout in milliseconds for provisioning token JWKS fetches.

properties.name: provisioning.token.http.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: HTTP read timeout in milliseconds for provisioning token JWKS fetches.

properties.name: allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: wallet.address
properties.description: Default wallet address.

properties.name: blockchain.network.active
properties.description: Active blockchain network (mainnet or sepolia).

properties.name: ethereum.mainnet.rpc.url
properties.description: Ethereum Mainnet RPC URL(s), comma-separated for fallback.

properties.name: ethereum.sepolia.rpc.url
properties.description: Ethereum Sepolia RPC URL(s), comma-separated for fallback.

properties.name: wallet.max.transactions.per.hour
properties.description: Maximum transactions per hour for wallet security.

properties.name: wallet.max.balance.checks.per.minute
properties.description: Maximum balance checks per minute for wallet security.

properties.name: wallet.persistence.enabled
properties.description: Enable persistent storage of encrypted wallets.

properties.name: wallet.persistence.file.path
properties.description: Path to wallet storage file.

properties.name: wallet.config.encryption-key
properties.description: Encryption key for wallet password in wallet-config.properties.

properties.name: wallet.config.encryption-key-file
properties.description: Path where the auto-generated encryption key is stored.

properties.name: antireplay.persistence.enabled
properties.description: Enable anti-replay persistence (for multi-instance deployments).

properties.name: ethereum.gas.price.strategy
properties.description: Gas price strategy for contract transactions. Use network to call eth_gasPrice with fallback, or fixed to always use ethereum.gas.price.default.

properties.name: ethereum.gas.price.default
properties.description: Fallback gas price in gwei. Used directly when ethereum.gas.price.strategy is fixed, otherwise only when eth_gasPrice fails.

properties.name: ethereum.gas.limit.default
properties.description: Default gas limit for simple transactions.

properties.name: ethereum.gas.limit.contract
properties.description: Default gas limit for contract interactions.

properties.name: ethereum.gas.limit.direct.booking
properties.description: Gas limit for direct booking transactions, which atomically execute request+confirm and require more gas.

properties.name: contract.events.to.listen
properties.description: Comma-separated list of contract events to listen for.

properties.name: contract.event.listening.enabled
properties.description: Enable contract event listening.

properties.name: contract.event.start.block
properties.description: Starting block for event listening.

properties.name: contract.event.websocket.enabled
properties.description: Enable WebSocket subscriptions for contract events.

properties.name: contract.event.polling.enabled
properties.description: Enable polling fallback for unreliable RPC nodes.

properties.name: contract.event.polling.interval.seconds
properties.description: Polling interval in seconds.

properties.name: contract.event.polling.block.range
properties.description: Maximum number of blocks per poll (inclusive).

properties.name: contract.event.polling.lookback.blocks
properties.description: Initial lookback blocks when starting.

properties.name: billing.admin.transactions.lookback-blocks
properties.description: Lookback block window for treasury admin on-chain transaction history queries.

properties.name: contract.reservation.reconcile.enabled
properties.description: Enable reservation reconciliation job.

properties.name: contract.reservation.reconcile.interval.ms
properties.description: Interval for reservation reconciliation in milliseconds.

properties.name: contract.reservation.reconcile.min-age.seconds
properties.description: Minimum age (seconds) before a pending reservation is reconciled.

properties.name: contract.reservation.reconcile.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of reservations to reconcile per run.

properties.name: reservation.early-checkin-tolerance-seconds
properties.description: Seconds allowed for early check-in before reservation start time.

properties.name: notifications.mail.enabled
properties.description: Enable email notifications.

properties.name: notifications.mail.driver
properties.description: Mail driver: noop, smtp, or graph.

properties.name: notifications.mail.from
properties.description: Email sender address.

properties.name: notifications.mail.from-name
properties.description: Email sender display name.

properties.name: notifications.mail.default-to
properties.description: Default recipient email address.

properties.name: notifications.mail.timezone
properties.description: Timezone for email notifications.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.host
properties.description: SMTP server hostname.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.port
properties.description: SMTP server port.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.username
properties.description: SMTP authentication username.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.password
properties.description: SMTP authentication password.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.auth
properties.description: Enable SMTP authentication.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.start-tls
properties.description: Enable STARTTLS for SMTP.

properties.name: notifications.mail.smtp.timeout-ms
properties.description: SMTP connection timeout in milliseconds.

properties.name: notifications.mail.graph.tenant-id
properties.description: Microsoft Graph tenant ID.

properties.name: notifications.mail.graph.client-id
properties.description: Microsoft Graph client ID.

properties.name: notifications.mail.graph.client-secret
properties.description: Microsoft Graph client secret.

properties.name: notifications.mail.graph.from
properties.description: Microsoft Graph sender email.

properties.name: notifications.config-file
properties.description: Path to notifications configuration file.

properties.name: saml.idp.metadata.url
properties.description: URL to SAML IdP metadata.

properties.name: saml.idp.metadata.override
properties.description: JSON map of issuer to SAML IdP metadata URL overrides.

properties.name: webauthn.base-url
properties.description: A description for 'webauthn.base-url'

properties.name: features.providers.registration.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable provider registration feature

properties.name: marketplace.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the DecentraLabs marketplace

properties.name: provider.name
properties.description: Name of the lab provider

properties.name: provider.email
properties.description: Contact email of the lab provider

properties.name: provider.country
properties.description: Country code of the lab provider (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

properties.name: provider.organization
properties.description: Organization name of the lab provider

properties.name: public.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL where this gateway is accessible

properties.name: treasury.collect.auto.enabled
properties.description: Enable periodic automatic lab payout collection with the configured institutional wallet.

properties.name: treasury.collect.auto.interval.ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds between automatic lab payout collection runs.

properties.name: treasury.collect.auto.initial-delay.ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first automatic lab payout collection run.

properties.name: treasury.collect.auto.max-batch
properties.description: Maximum reservations to process per collect transaction submitted by the auto-collect scheduler.

properties.name: treasury.collect.auto.max-rounds-per-lab
properties.description: Maximum collect transactions attempted per lab in each auto-collect scheduler run.

properties.name: treasury.prune.auto.enabled
properties.description: Enable periodic automatic payout heap pruning for labs associated with the configured institutional wallet.

properties.name: treasury.prune.auto.interval.ms
properties.description: Delay in milliseconds between automatic payout heap pruning runs.

properties.name: treasury.prune.auto.initial-delay.ms
properties.description: Initial delay in milliseconds before the first automatic payout heap pruning run.

properties.name: treasury.prune.auto.max-iterations
properties.description: Maximum heap entries to inspect per lab in each automatic prune transaction.

properties.name: treasury.prune.auto.max-labs-per-run
properties.description: Maximum number of provider labs processed in each automatic prune scheduler run.

properties.name: billing.admin.domain.name
properties.description: EIP-712 domain name for treasury admin signatures

properties.name: billing.admin.domain.version
properties.description: EIP-712 domain version for treasury admin signatures

properties.name: billing.admin.domain.chain-id
properties.description: Chain ID for treasury admin EIP-712 domain

properties.name: billing.admin.domain.verifying-contract
properties.description: Verifying contract address for treasury admin EIP-712 domain. Defaults to contract.address.

properties.name: security.session-observer.credentials-json
properties.description: JSON object mapping trusted gateway IDs to Base64URL HS256 secrets.

properties.name: access.audit.observation-window-tolerance-seconds
properties.description: Tolerance in seconds when matching an observed access credential to its audit window.

properties.name: access.audit.observation-clock-skew-seconds
properties.description: Maximum accepted clock skew in seconds for access credential observations.

properties.name: session.attestation.publisher.stuck-transaction-ms
properties.description: Age after which a pending SessionStarted transaction is replaced.

properties.name: session.attestation.publisher.nonce-replacement-gas-bump-percent
properties.description: Gas-price increase per SessionStarted replacement broadcast.
